name: Arrays & Strings
description: Core array manipulations, sliding window, two-pointer techniques, and string algorithms.

name: Linked Lists & Trees
description: Singly and doubly linked lists, binary trees, BSTs, tree traversals, and tree-based algorithms.

name: Graphs
description: Graph representations, BFS, DFS, shortest paths, MST, and topological sorting.

name: Dynamic Programming
description: Memoization, tabulation, knapsack, LCS, LIS, and DP on trees and graphs.

name: Recursion & Backtracking
description: Recursive problem-solving, permutations, combinations, subset generation, and constraint satisfaction.

name: Sorting & Searching
description: Comparison-based and linear-time sorting, binary search variants, and search algorithms.

name: Design Fundamentals
description: Load balancers, caching, CDNs, proxies, and horizontal vs vertical scaling.

name: Scalability Patterns
description: Sharding, partitioning, replication, consistent hashing, and rate limiting.

name: Database Design
description: Schema design, indexing strategies, read replicas, and data partitioning approaches.

name: API Design
description: REST, GraphQL, gRPC, API versioning, pagination, and idempotency.

name: Microservices
description: Service decomposition, inter-service communication, service mesh, and observability.

name: Core Java
description: Language syntax, generics, exception handling, lambdas, streams, and I/O.

name: Collections Framework
description: List, Set, Map, Queue, Deque implementations, sorting, and concurrent collections.

name: Multithreading & Concurrency
description: Thread lifecycle, synchronization, locks, executors, and CompletableFuture.

name: JVM Internals
description: Class loading, memory model, garbage collection, bytecode, and JIT compilation.

name: Spring Core & Data
description: IoC container, dependency injection, Spring Data JPA, and transaction management.

name: Spring Security
description: Authentication, authorization, JWT, OAuth2, method security, and CSRF protection.

name: Spring Cloud
description: Service discovery, config server, circuit breakers, API gateways, and distributed tracing.

name: SQL & Query Optimization
description: Complex queries, joins, subqueries, window functions, indexing, and execution plans.

name: NoSQL Databases
description: Document stores, key-value stores, column families, graph databases, and use case selection.

name: Database Internals
description: B-trees, LSM trees, ACID, MVCC, isolation levels, and replication strategies.

name: Process & Memory Management
description: Process states, scheduling algorithms, virtual memory, paging, and segmentation.

name: File Systems
description: File system architecture, inodes, directory structure, mounting, and storage allocation.

name: Concurrency & Synchronization
description: Threads, mutexes, semaphores, deadlocks, and classical synchronization problems.

name: Networking Fundamentals
description: OSI and TCP/IP models, IP addressing, routing, ARP, and DNS.

name: Transport & Application Layer
description: TCP, UDP, flow control, congestion control, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and WebSockets.

name: Network Security
description: Firewalls, TLS/SSL, VPNs, DDoS mitigation, and secure network architecture.

name: CAP Theorem & Consistency
description: CAP theorem, PACELC, consistency models, quorums, and conflict resolution.

name: Distributed Storage
description: Distributed file systems, key-value stores, consensus algorithms, and replication.

name: Message Queues
description: Kafka, RabbitMQ, pub-sub patterns, event sourcing, and stream processing.

name: React Core & State
description: Components, hooks, context, refs, and state management patterns in React.

name: React Ecosystem
description: Next.js, React Router, React Query, Form libraries, and component libraries.

name: React Performance
description: Memoization, code splitting, lazy loading, virtualization, and rendering optimization.

name: HTML, CSS & JavaScript
description: Semantic HTML, CSS layouts, animations, ES6+, modules, and browser APIs.

name: TypeScript
description: Type system, generics, utility types, advanced patterns, and TypeScript configuration.

name: Build Tools & Testing
description: Webpack, Vite, ESLint, Prettier, Jest, Testing Library, and E2E testing.

name: Docker Fundamentals
description: Dockerfile, images, containers, volumes, networking, and Docker Compose.

name: Container Best Practices
description: Multi-stage builds, image optimization, security scanning, and registry management.

name: Kubernetes Fundamentals
description: Pods, deployments, services, ConfigMaps, secrets, and namespaces.

name: Kubernetes Operations
description: Ingress, Helm, operators, autoscaling, persistent volumes, and cluster management.

name: AWS Compute & Storage
description: EC2, Lambda, S3, EBS, EFS, and storage lifecycle management.

name: AWS Networking & Serverless
description: VPC, Route 53, CloudFront, API Gateway, DynamoDB, and Step Functions.

name: CI/CD
description: GitHub Actions, Jenkins, pipeline design, automated testing, and deployment strategies.

name: Monitoring & Infrastructure as Code
description: Prometheus, Grafana, Terraform, Ansible, log aggregation, and alerting.

name: Git & Version Control
description: Branching strategies, rebasing, merging, GitHub workflows, and Git internals.

name: Application & Network Security
description: OWASP Top 10, secure coding, input validation, authN/authZ, and penetration testing.

name: Cryptography & IAM
description: Symmetric and asymmetric encryption, hashing, digital signatures, and identity management.

name: ML & LLMs
description: Supervised and unsupervised learning, neural networks, transformers, and prompt engineering.

name: AI Agents & MLOps
description: Autonomous agents, RAG, model deployment, monitoring, and ML pipeline orchestration.

name: Design Patterns
description: Creational, structural, and behavioral patterns, and their practical applications.

name: Architectural Patterns
description: Layered, hexagonal, event-driven, CQRS, and event sourcing architectures.

name: DDD & Clean Architecture
description: Ubiquitous language, bounded contexts, entities, value objects, and dependency inversion.

name: Project Planning
description: Requirements gathering, scope definition, sprint planning, estimation, and risk management.

name: Code Quality & Documentation
description: Code reviews, static analysis, refactoring, technical writing, and API documentation.

name: Deployment & Operations
description: Release management, rollback strategies, blue-green deployment, and incident response.

name: DSA Practice
description: Pattern-based problem solving, timed mock interviews, and company-specific preparation.

name: System Design & Behavioral Prep
description: Whiteboarding system designs, STAR method, leadership principles, and negotiation.

name: Books & Research Tracking
description: Tracking reading progress, synthesizing knowledge, and maintaining a research backlog.
